line: - Extended `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs:9316` so the existing mixed-lifecycle wrapper regression now proves:

- `why` still shows the targeted-memory contract: `query_by_example_seed_materialized`, `reconsolidation_window_open`, and `lifecycle_projection`
- `cargo check --all-targets` still reports a pre-existing warning at `crates/membrain-daemon/src/daemon.rs:1859` for unused `persisted_memory_count`.
